author: vvo
subject: v1.8.8
body: ## [1.8.8](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/compare/v1.8.6...v1.8.8) (2016-09-14) ### Bug Fixes * **numericSelector:** do not change state on init (#1280) ([cf27db3](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/cf27db3)), closes [#1253](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/issues/1253) * **Slider:** default precision to 2 (#1279) ([552b9ea](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/552b9ea))
